title: Country Targeting (India only)
setup: Creates a dominant-CPM campaign targeted to country IN only, then sends equal traffic from IN, US and UK.
expected_standard_behaviour: Only IN traffic receives the campaign; US and UK get no fill from it.
expected_verdict_vs_voise_adserver: GAP — the VAST endpoint /api/v/{tag} accepts no country parameter and decide_vast_ad evaluates no geo targeting, so the campaign serves every country regardless of its IN-only target.
